features: retries transient Cloudflare Worker upload failures for Core, Edge and Processor
recognizes Cloudflare API codes 10013 and 10035 as retryable
retries HTTP 408, 409, 425, 429, 500, 502, 503 and 504 with exponential backoff
rebuilds multipart FormData for every retry so consumed request bodies are never reused
preserves existing Worker bindings through bindings_inherit=strict
adds retry protection to Python helper binding and live-usage Durable Object provisioning
keeps full smart button color coverage from 3.3.41
does not change the database schema

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot

validation.retry_simulation: passed: two code-10013 failures followed by successful third upload
validation.multipart_rebuild: passed: a fresh FormData body is created for every attempt
validation.live_api: not run; requires production Cloudflare credentials

limitations: A platform-wide Cloudflare outage can still delay deployment after all retry attempts are exhausted.
The retry logic becomes active after this Core version has been deployed; the first installation attempt is still performed by the currently installed Core.
Telegram button styles remain limited to primary, success, danger, or default.
title: مهار خطای موقت انتشار Cloudflare
summary: خطاهای موقت Cloudflare مانند 10013 و 10035 دیگر با اولین پاسخ ناموفق انتشار را متوقف نمی‌کنند و آپلود هر Worker تا چهار بار با بدنه تازه تکرار می‌شود.
changes: افزودن Retry مرحله‌ای به انتشار Core، Edge و Processor.
ساخت مجدد FormData در هر تلاش برای جلوگیری از استفاده دوباره از بدنه مصرف‌شده.
افزودن Retry به Python Helper و Durable Object مصرف زنده.
ثبت HTTP Status، کد Cloudflare، CF-Ray و شماره تلاش در خطای نهایی.
حفظ کامل رنگ‌بندی هوشمند کلیدها بدون تغییر دیتابیس.
